meaning: n.楠氬姩,鍔ㄤ贡,鎵撴壈,骞叉壈,楠氫贡,鎼呭姩
examples: He was charged with causing a disturbance after the game.
During the disturbance which followed, three Englishmen were hurt.
The building work is creating constant noise, dust and disturbance.
London has seen a wave of "copycat criminal activity" since the initial disturbance, the Met Police said.
However, Mr Baggott said officers had to weigh up whether intervening would create a greater disturbance.
